news.title: Oterra's sustainability management recognized by EcoVadis
news.short_description: Oterra, a leading producer of natural colors and color solutions, has been awarded an EcoVadis Silver medal in recognition of its sustainability management, placing it in the top 15% of all companies assessed by EcoVadis globally in the past 12 months.

news.title: Martin Sonntag steps down as CEO of Oterra
news.short_description: Oterra, a leading producer of natural colors and color solutions, today announced that its CEO Martin Sonntag has decided to step down and leave Oterra for personal reasons. The Board of Directors has initiated a search process for the next CEO.

news.title: Oterra launches 2030 Sustainability Strategy with focus on Nature, Climate and People
news.short_description: Oterra, a leading producer of natural colors and color solutions, has released its 2030 Sustainability Strategy, which sets out ambitious targets to reduce the company's impact while keeping pace with the growing demand for colors sourced from natural ingredients.

news.title: Color Trends 2026: How emotion, wellness, and natural color are shaping the future of food and beverages
news.short_description: New global research from Oterra shows color is no longer just visual - it's functional, emotional, and central to consumer trust. Consumers increasingly expect food and beverages to deliver both purpose and emotion and natural colors play a critical role.

news.title: Oterra reports full year (2024/25) results with strong growth: EBITDA up 38 percent on previous year
news.short_description: Oterra Holding ApS, a leading producer of natural colors and color solutions, has released its full-year results for 2024/25, with revenue of EUR 447.1 million, up 7% year-on-year and EBITDA up 38% year-on-year.

news.title: Oterra signs partnership with Seprify to bring natural white color replacement for titanium dioxide to food and beverage industry
news.short_description: Oterra and Swiss innovator Seprify announced a strategic commercial partnership to market a plant-based white coloring that can replace titanium dioxide (TiO₂) in food and beverage applications.

news.title: Oterra's clean label FruitMax® Purple 105 brings an 'adventurous' purple shade for beverages and candy
news.short_description: Oterra, a leading producer of natural colors and color solutions, has launched FruitMax® Purple 105, a clean-label purple shade with superior stability for beverage and confectionery manufacturers.

news.title: Oterra appoints Arnd Kaldowski as Chair of the Board to support US growth opportunity
news.short_description: Oterra, a leading producer of natural colors and color solutions, has appointed Arnd Kaldowski as Chair, succeeding Cees de Jong. During the last four years, Cees de Jong has played a critical role in shaping Oterra's success.

news.title: The power of Limited Time Offers: How natural colors can help hit the sweet spot
news.short_description: Consumers love Limited Time Offers (LTOs) in confectionery, and according to a new survey by Oterra, naturally-colored LTOs are a great way to create urgency, drive sales, capitalize on seasonal trends and generate buzz.

news.title: Concerned U.S. shoppers ready for natural colors in food and beverages
news.short_description: More than 75% of American consumers are concerned or somewhat concerned about consuming food and beverages containing artificial dyes, according to a poll announced today.

news.title: Oterra opens new HQ in Mt. Pleasant to meet the demand for natural colors
news.short_description: Oterra, a leading producer of natural colors and color solutions, officially opened its state-of-the art innovation, collaboration, and production hub on May 7 in Mt. Pleasant, WI. The 155,000 sq ft US Headquarters combines innovation and application labs with a new manufacturing and logistics facility.

news.title: Oterra ready to support food and beverage manufacturers in the move to natural colors
news.short_description: Oterra, a leading producer of natural colors and color solutions, has welcomed the decision by The U.S. Department of Health and Human Services and U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) to phase out petroleum-based artificial colors in food and beverages.

news.title: Oterra's Cake Modern: Where Baking Art Meets Natural Colors
news.short_description: Oterra, a leading producer of natural colors and color solutions, has opened the doors to Cake Modern, an inspirational, online universe that brings together artistry, innovation, and nature's vibrant colors to transform baked goods into edible masterpieces.

news.title: Oterra appoints Jesper Svarer as Group CFO
news.short_description: Oterra, a leading producer of natural colors and color solutions, has appointed Jesper Svarer as its new Group Chief Financial Officer. Jesper has more than 20 years of experience from corporate finance, strategy, and M&A roles.

news.title: New color blending center supports growth of natural alternatives in India, Asia Pacific and Middle East
news.short_description: Oterra, a global leader in natural colors for the food and beverage sector has inaugurated a new color blending and application center in Kerala, India, to serve the growing Indian, Asia Pacific and Middle East markets.

news.title: Color Trends 2025: Immerse yourself in Oterra's vibrant stream of colors
news.short_description: Oterra, a leading producer of natural colors and color solutions, has introduced its Color Trends 2025 to inspire brands, marketers, R&D teams, and consultants to harness the power of color like never before.

news.title: High-tech partnership creates a natural blue color for a greener tomorrow
news.short_description: Spirulina made in Iceland using an innovative cultivation process will provide food and beverage producers with a vivid, natural blue color with an impressively low carbon footprint. Arctic Blue is the first product from the partnership between Oterra and Iceland's VAXA Technologies.

news.title: Oterra appoints Mia Kjersner as Chief Operating Officer
news.short_description: Oterra, a leading producer of natural colors for the food and beverage industry, has appointed Mia Kjersner as its new Chief Operating Officer. Mia joins Oterra on February 1 from a position at GN Store Nord.

news.title: Oterra strengthens its US presence to meet demand for natural colors
news.short_description: Oterra, a leader in natural colors for the food and beverage sector, is building on its capabilities in the US with a state-of-the art innovation, collaboration, and production hub in Mt. Pleasant, WI.

news.title: Savory foods don't have to play it safe - beyond orange and yellow lies a world of color
news.short_description: Orange and yellow may be popular colors for savory food, but manufacturers could be missing a rainbow of untapped possibilities with bolder, unexpected shades, according to a new survey from Oterra.

news.title: Oterra Introduces I-Colors® Bold: Redefining Intensity in Natural Colorization
news.short_description: Oterra, a global leader in natural colors, has introduced six bold new variants to its I-Colors® line. It is now possible to introduce a vivid red for snack applications that can compete with artificial colors for impact, but using sweet potato as a raw material.

news.title: Oterra welcomes Hubert Windegger as new Chief Financial Officer
news.short_description: Oterra announces a new incoming Chief Financial Officer, Hubert Windegger, who will join effective April 22nd, 2024. Hubert brings over 14 years of finance leadership experience.

news.title: Oterra Takes Giant Leap on Decarbonization Journey with Biomass Boiler in Cossé-le-Vivien
news.short_description: Oterra marks a significant step on its decarbonization journey with the reveal of its state-of-the-art 3.5 MW biomass boiler at the Cossé-le-Vivien site in France.

news.title: Oterra and VAXA Technologies are forging paths in Innovation and Sustainability, A Pioneering Partnership: Unveiling Sustainable Color Derived from Icelandic Microalgae
news.short_description: Oterra, a global leader in natural color solutions, proudly announces a pioneering partnership with VAXA Technologies, introducing an environmentally conscious and carbon-neutral process that delivers a breakthrough natural color component derived from microalgae.

news.title: Oterra's ambitious GHG emission reduction targets validated by the Science Based Targets initiative
news.short_description: The Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi) has validated Oterra's scope 1 and 2 target ambitions as in line with a 1.5°C trajectory, currently the most ambitious designation available through the SBTi process.

news.title: Oterra and Ecoflora Cares join forces to build a world of responsibly sourced naturally colored foods in Blues and beyond
news.short_description: The US Food and Drug Administration's (FDA) announcement approving Jagua Blue as a food colorant for a wide range of applications marks a significant achievement for Ecoflora Cares. Oterra and Ecoflora Cares join forces in this initiative.

news.title: Martin Sonntag appointed as new Chief Executive Officer to Oterra
news.short_description: Oterra, the world's leading supplier of natural colors, announces the appointment of Martin Sonntag as its new CEO as of 1 January 2024.

news.title: Oterra unveils Simply Brown range – a game-changing clean label caramel replacement
news.short_description: Oterra, the world's leading supplier of natural colors for food and beverage, is pleased to announce the immediate launch of its groundbreaking Simply Brown range, expertly crafted from apples.

news.title: Oterra's New Red and Pink natural color blends the smart 'plant for plant' option
news.short_description: Oterra, the world's leading supplier of natural colors for food and beverage, is pleased to announce the immediate launch of its new ready-to-use Red and Pink ColorFruit® and FruitMax® blends for plant-based meat and seafood.

news.title: Mads Dehlsen Winther joins Oterra as new Chief Financial Officer (CFO)
news.short_description: Oterra, the world's leading supplier of natural colors with the widest portfolio in the industry, announces the appointment of Mads Dehlsen Winther as its new Group CFO. Winther joins Oterra in April 2023.

news.title: Oterra welcomes Global Sustainability talent to the team
news.short_description: Oterra, the world's leading supplier of natural colors, announces the addition of Vera Karmebäck to the team as its first Global Sustainability Lead.

news.title: Oterra™ solidifies APAC footprint with closing of its latest acquisition
news.short_description: Oterra, the world's leading supplier of natural colors with the widest portfolio in the industry, announces that the acquisition of India's Akay Group is now complete.

news.title: World's widest portfolio of natural colors gets even stronger: Oterra acquires India's Akay Group
news.short_description: Oterra, the world's leading supplier of natural colors, further strengthens its core offerings with the acquisition of Akay Group, a prominent natural ingredients manufacturer.

news.title: Industry's best natural beverage alternative to Red40 launched
news.short_description: Oterra, the world's leading supplier of natural colors, announces the launch of the industry's best natural alternative to Red40/Allura Red for beverage – Hansen Sweet Potato FruitMax® Red 116 WS.

news.title: Oterra launches extended caramel range
news.short_description: Oterra, the largest provider of natural colors in the world, announces the launch of its extended caramel range, further bolstering its impressive portfolio of colors from natural sources.

news.title: Oterra continues its growth track with the acquisition of Food Ingredient Solutions
news.short_description: Oterra, the world's leading supplier of natural colors, continues its strong growth acceleration, announcing the acquisition of Food Ingredient Solutions, a leading American producer of colors and natural antioxidants.

news.title: Oterra set to be un-beet-able after closing its latest acquisition
news.short_description: Oterra™, the world's leading supplier of natural colors with the widest portfolio in the industry, announces the acquisition of Diana Food's natural food coloring business was completed on the 29th December 2021.

news.title: Oterra™ to predict the future with exclusive food futurologist partnership
news.short_description: Oterra, the world's leading supplier of natural colors with the widest portfolio in the industry, announces an exclusive partnership with renowned food futurologist Dr Morgaine Gaye.

news.title: Oterra signs agreement to acquire Diana Food's Coloring Business
news.short_description: Oterra™ announces that both parties have signed the transactional agreement to acquire Diana Food's natural food coloring business.

news.title: Oterra™ Completes Acquisition of SECNA Natural Ingredients Group S.L
news.short_description: Oterra announces that it has closed its acquisition of SECNA Natural Ingredients Group S.L. This is the first acquisition for Oterra, which itself was purchased by private investment firm EQT in March 2021.

news.title: Oterra™ in discussions to Acquire Diana Food's Coloring Business
news.short_description: The world leader of natural food colors, Oterra, announces plans to continue its strong growth acceleration through the acquisition of Diana Food's natural food coloring business.

news.title: Chr. Hansen Natural Colors Announces Company Name Change to Oterra
news.short_description: Chr. Hansen Natural Colors A/S, an EQT portfolio company, announces the company will be known as Oterra™, effective immediately, reflecting the company's commitment to provide the world with colors from natural sources.

news.title: Chr. Hansen Natural Colors Acquires SECNA Natural Ingredients Group S.L.
news.short_description: Chr. Hansen Natural Colors, an EQT portfolio company, announces its first major transaction after becoming a standalone company, with the integration of SECNA Natural Ingredients Group S.L into its portfolio.
